title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 362.109 - Restrictions on orders and ordinances of political subdivisions
text:
362.109.  Restrictions on orders and ordinances of political subdivisions. — Notwithstanding any law to the contrary, any order or ordinance by any political subdivision shall be consistent with and not more restrictive than state law and regulations governing lending or deposit-taking entities regulated by the division of finance or the division of credit unions.
(L. 2001 H.B. 738 merged with S.B. 186, A.L. 2008 S.B. 788)
